title: stelis solomonii
intro: Stelis solomonii, also known as Solomon's spurge, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, characterized by its milky sap and toxic latex. The medicinal properties of Stelis solomonii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, Stelis solomonii can be used to make topical creams and ointments, as well as tinctures and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to its toxic latex.
